summary: Archon: 2 M+ tier moves (RSham/Disc), survivability repopulated (8 shifts), 46 enc cells. Other tiers/metrics 0-change. WCL rdps-broken: 5 unreachable, 3 raw. No new build; 1 take, 2 vids queued.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl; parsed table.tier-list rows (tier <td> + tier-list-entry img alt). Era-verified Midnight/Season 1/Devourer. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, tiers S/A+/A/B/C, 0 tier moves vs stored. Page snapshots advanced 07-17 to 07-18.

Both pages fetched live; parsed tier__tier s/a/b/c blocks via icons/spec/<class>/<spec>.png + img alt. Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream - absence, not error), M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. Snapshots 07-17 to 07-18.

All 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai (x-no-cache). Numbered rankings parsed leniently (S-tier, missing-space/missing-open-paren idioms e.g. 'Subtlety Rogue B Tier)'). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7. 80 rows (40+40), 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. Snapshots 07-17 to 07-18.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection via /wow/builds/<spec>/<class>/ slugs; 80 rows, 0 unmatched, upstream lastUpdated raid+M+ 2026-07-17T12Z. 2 M+ tier moves: Restoration Shaman S->A, Discipline Priest A->B (both 1-band). Snapshots 07-17 to 07-18.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 46 changed vs stored across 11 encounters (normal daily churn). encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

Survivability tierList REPOPULATED this fetch (was empty tiers:[] last run) - full 40/40 specs across the 3 raid pages, merged via apply-metrics survivability key. 8 real 1-band shifts (Marksmanship A->S; Devastation/Retribution/Feral/RestoSham/RestoDruid/Preservation/Discipline C or B ->up). asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai x-no-cache; Rankings-table Tier column parsed by 'Meta Build' title (X/Unranked skipped), 40 specs matched. Era-verified MN 12.0.7 Season 1. 0 moves vs stored. Raid pages still 0-records upstream - left unranked (snapshot null). Snapshots 07-17 to 07-18.

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-18T11:32Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 - the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:171 3T:114 5T:1583). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-18.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula'tek 0 - untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-18.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 669-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-18.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET; parsed the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling anchored on each meta-item href (handled reversed href/class attribute order), range 3738-4288. Era-verified Midnight Season 1. 0 value changes vs stored (Murlok refreshes ~8h). asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored. asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.txt) re-fetched: SimulationCraft 1205-01, WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-18/68453 - era-verified, no season flip. 26/26 DPS specs parsed as best variant per spec from the DPS Ranking (hyphen hero-variant names handled; anomalous 0% duplicate block excluded via max). Small nightly deltas across all 26. Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

Period 1072 MID1 (Lindormi's Guidance / Xal'atath's Bargain: Pulsar, Fortified, Tyrannical) re-fetched live via r.jina.ai /period/latest; era-verified, no season flip. Same period as stored = same top-2000 distribution (class shares Druid 19.2/DK 16.9/Monk 16.2... unchanged), so no per-spec value change; 40 rows re-stamped current. asOf 07-17 to 07-18.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Linxy Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14 22:46Z) under already-logged build #14 - NO new forum build. RSS newest 12.1 items (07-17) are PvP Class Tuning, a Delve boss preview, and Season 2 Mythic+ (dungeon/boss) tuning - none a new class development-notes build or a per-spec review with a clear verdict. ptr-builds.json unchanged; no writeups fabricated. zone-54/52/56 evidence-only (rdps-broken).

All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK). His MW/HPal key reads duplicate same-day takes 148/149 - transcript-verified-skipped.
